title: citrus hystrix
intro: Citrus hystrix, also known as the kaffir lime or wild lime, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian and Indonesian medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Citrus hystrix include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Citrus hystrix include the use of its leaves, bark, and fruit in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
